{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alin's golden armor
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] is wearing heavy golden armor.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] wears shredded remnants of gold armor.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
